items.name: TLDR
items.blurb: Daily email digest covering tech, startups, and science with multiple vertical newsletters.

items.blurb: Daily business news newsletter covering markets, tech, and culture for a professional audience.

items.blurb: HubSpot-owned daily newsletter covering business and tech news for entrepreneurs and operators.

items.blurb: Weekly roundup of JavaScript news, articles, and tutorials curated by Peter Cooper.

items.name: Bytes
items.blurb: Entertaining weekly JavaScript newsletter blending real news with humor for developers.

items.blurb: Weekly front-end web development newsletter covering HTML, CSS, and browser platform news.

items.name: Lenny's Newsletter
items.blurb: Weekly advice on product management, growth, and career for product and startup professionals.

items.name: The Neuron
items.blurb: Daily AI newsletter covering tools, research, and practical use cases for a general audience.

items.name: Superhuman AI
items.blurb: Newsletter teaching professionals how to use AI tools to work faster, with sponsor placements.

items.name: Marketing Brew
items.blurb: Morning Brew vertical focused on advertising, media, and marketing industry news.

items.name: Dense Discovery
items.blurb: Thoughtful weekly newsletter for designers and creatives covering tools, culture, and ideas.

items.name: Indie Hackers Newsletter
items.blurb: Community newsletter for bootstrapped founders sharing revenue milestones and growth stories.

items.blurb: Weekly newsletter for developers highlighting interesting open-source tools and devtools products.
